chosen_action.title: Verify duplicate guard-pause churn is actually suppressed

why_this_action.summary: The highest-leverage move during the current hold window was to validate the fresh guard-reuse repair so the next marketing cron slots stop burning themselves on duplicate empty-board pause artifacts.
shared_findings_used: marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet exists before 2026-05-26T08:57:00

result.summary: Targeted regression coverage passed. Guard execution lookup now accepts legacy same-reason logs, stale detection no longer churns on auto-refreshed latest artifacts, and main-loop reuse works when the empty-board truth is unchanged.
